verse_text: I commend to you Phoebe our sister, who is a servant of the church in Cenchrea,

links.context: The Church's greatest saint is a woman, the Virgin Mary, Mother of God. Some women, including Mary Magdalene, are called "Equal to the Apostles," others serve as deacons ([[ROM.16:1]]). While sharing full equality in Christ, women are not ordained to the offices of bishop and presbyter.
